title:
PENTHOUSE GROOVE's DJ VIDEO🎧
【Dizzy and high】
old rock.slow bossa.avant pop feat. The High Llamas and more hypnotic  tune.
flower power. no war.

今回はROY BUDD - "Hearts and Diamonds"からBebel Gilberto – “Samba Da Benção”へのシーンをお届け。
某映画のサウンドトラックらしく映像が音から立ち上がってくるようなサウンドが魅力の楽曲から、南米らしい柔らかな陽射しが差し込むかのような春にぴったりの楽曲への繋ぎをお楽しみください。

This time, we’re bringing you a scene from Roy Budd’s “Hearts and Diamonds” to Bebel Gilberto’s “Samba Da Benção.”
Enjoy the transition from a track whose soundtrack-like quality makes images rise vividly from the sound, to a spring-perfect tune that feels like soft South American sunlight pouring in.
